SLOT ingatellentConfigProperties
INSERT {
	property ~&6503679477&~ splitViewActivated: ~&214625660372&~
	property ~&197088788&~ secondToolbarHorizontalPosition: 1
	property ~&197088788&~ secondToolbarPortraitPosition: 3
}
END SLOT
AFFECT [[2328484894988065446]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
INSERT { property ~&6503679477&~ openInSplitView: ~&214625660372&~ }
REDEFINE [[7713401573498017]]
            LOCATE AFTER STREAM / }){ / INSERT {
                ~&214622607920&~ currentDocumentView = openInSplitView && ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated ? splitDocumentView : ~&15793094956877902211&~;
            }
            REPLACE { ~&15793094956877902211&~ } WITH { currentDocumentView }
END REDEFINE
REBUILD [[254480451320573660.495334332051582499]]
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM \~&15793094956877902211&~\ INSERT {
splitDocumentView.~&6503936152&~?.~&7983535270340669650&~ &&
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[7713531976371484]]
LOCATE AFTER [[8397993708429497603]]#[[7713694313857736]]
INSERT {
	~&8397993708429497603&~ {
	~&5972374&~: splitViewRoot
		readonly property ~&6503679477&~ secondView: ~&6504329801&~
		~&214646099849&~: ~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~ ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ : ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~/2
		~&7082729686082&~: ~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~ ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~/2 : ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
		~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~ ? ~&7713694313857736&~.~&6504027668&~ : ~&7713694313857736&~.~&214640173127&~
		~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: ~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~ ? ~&7713694313857736&~.~&7082507142622&~ : ~&7713694313857736&~.~&197100796&~
		~&214626153769&~: ~&6504329801&~
		~&6503711953&~: ~&6504329801&~
		~&233748328658231&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated
        
            ~&7083177690781&~: [
                ~&214603798730&~ {
                    ~&6504095402&~: "SplitDocumentView"
                    ~&6504426203&~: splitDocumentView.~&6503936152&~.~&6314931342349002257&~
                    ~&887939191986104807&~ {
                        ~&7083194890448&~: splitDocumentView
                        ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504329801&~
                    }
                }
            ]

            ~&254495336496498420&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: splitNavigator
		readonly property ~&6503679477&~ secondNavigator: ~&6504329801&~
		~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&9864012679881706301&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&9864012679881706301&~
                ~&3149181060716619156&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&3149181060716619156&~
                ~&2766288418351025740&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&2766288418351025740&~
                ~&214626153769&~: ~&233748328658231&~ && !~&14839296689095546654&~.~&7082453764421&~
                ~&16400203684079186719&~: ~&14839296689095546654&~
                ~&18307285205407458435&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&5528987290049822124&~
                ~&495572996767745525&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~
                ~&4712892340459039035&~: ~&8398537280477478927&~.~&7713561876955258&~
                ~&14825814810595278773&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&14825814810595278773&~
                ~&10509964749635331227&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&10509964749635331227&~
                ~&254522585318599537&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254522585318599537&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: !~&6504254477&~.~&9729068523592542297&~.~&8400180753700265146&~ && !splitDocumentView.~&6503936152&~?.~&6314931342349002257&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated && ~&456860916926733567&~.~&8399230650759125120&~ != ~&456860916926733567&~.~&6503241380&~.~&7081907567135&~

                ~&11246284191331601274&~: (~&214624950331&~, ~&6504167078&~) => {

                    ~&2766288418351025740&~.~&6504147419&~(~&"80852525132738217&~, { ~&8399386052748489877&~: ~&214624950331&~.~&5972374&~, ~&6504167078&~: ~&6504167078&~ });
                }

                ~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: {
                    splitDocumentView.~&16021043814775702381&~ = splitDocumentViewComponent;
                    /* library is ready at this point due to module awaiting ready*/
                }
            }
	    ~&7081645463424&~ {
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "SplitDocumentView"
                ~&5972374&~: splitDocumentView
                ~&15648605738915750485&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: !!splitDocumentView.~&6503936152&~?.~&6314931342349002257&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated 
                ~&214626153769&~: ~&233748328658231&~
		/* remember to check for document opened*/
		~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: ~&7081446729498&~.splitDocumentViewLoader = splitDocumentView
                ~&254480451320573660&~.~&4464585548018432538&~: ~&7081446729498&~.splitDocumentViewLoader = ~&6504117156&~

                /* For when we try opening a document before the loader is ready*/
                property ~&197102514&~ ~&8210102505884208147&~: ~&6504117156&~
                property ~&197102514&~ ~&4161736167111118684&~: () => { splitDocumentView.~&6503936152&~.~&16350670950752674586&~(~&8210102505884208147&~); }
                ~&7713401454751279&~: {
                    ~&5972376&~ (!!~&8210102505884208147&~) {
                        ~&6622264625199152281&~(~&8210102505884208147&~, ~&4161736167111118684&~);
                        splitDocumentView.~&8210102505884208147&~ = ~&6504117156&~;
                    }
                }
            }

		
            ~&254480451320573660&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: splitDocumentViewComponent
                ~&14175747548438644067&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: splitDocumentViewItem
		    readonly property ~&6503679477&~ hasQuickSettingsGesture: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated && !~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~
                    ~&7713433736001692&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&7713433736001692&~
                    ~&14054373467553779636&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&14054373467553779636&~
                    ~&14259564207776773479&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&14259564207776773479&~
                    ~&7842066060529582499&~: ~&5751670711254023426&~
                    ~&7713433728813122&~: ~&11206357713879652003&~.~&496507644976596653&~
                    ~&8400115464476676380&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&8400115464476676380&~
                    ~&2766288418351025740&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&2766288418351025740&~
                    ~&18307285205407458435&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&5528987290049822124&~
                    ~&4712892340459039035&~: ~&8398537280477478927&~.~&7713561876955258&~
                    ~&15845976219488365318&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15845976219488365318&~
                    ~&495572996767745525&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~
                    ~&8400072290688674154&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&8400072290688674154&~
                    ~&10509964749635331227&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&10509964749635331227&~
                    ~&254522585318599537&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254522585318599537&~
                    ~&482865290967253827&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&482865290967253827&~
                    ~&14825814810595278773&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&14825814810595278773&~

                    ~&214626153769&~: ~&6504329801&~ /* Loader is a focus scope. This translates to having focus whenever the loader does.*/
                    /*onSearchRequested: {*/
                    /*    navigator.showSearch();*/
                    /*}*/

                    ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                        ~&7083194890448&~: ~&233694067165438&~
                        function ~&8789052782016896247&~(~&197088457&~) {
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&7712934851008712&~ && ~&197088457&~.~&7713146641368448&~(~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~)) {
                                splitDocumentView.~&6503936152&~.~&214622501183&~();
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ~&7256940299957714445&~: (~&478136262235079021&~) => {
                        ~&14288768556891793411&~.~&7713146761148186&~ = ~&478136262235079021&~;
                        ~&14288768556891793411&~.~&233748328658231&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                    }

                    ~&17274701102379791786&~: {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&16744692231240474815&~.~&7712892661442248&~(~&"13710581283192580798&~)) {
                            ~&6504254477&~.~&2766288418351025740&~.~&214622501183&~(~&"13710581283192580798&~);
                        }
                    }

                    ~&13184053911240945935&~: {
                        ~&9525712753438949609&~.~&15513197134136840912&~ = ~&7712934851008712&~ ? ~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~ : "";
                    }
                }
            }

~&254494525842443467&~ {
    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
    ~&17223207193572774747&~: ~&6504329801&~
    ~&254542253295368380&~: (~&214625221355&~) => {
    	splitViewRoot.~&9186019576827190292&~();
        ~&214625221355&~.~&7712791479213250&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
	openInSplitView = ~&6504329801&~;
    }
}


    }
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[7713694313857736]]
LOCATE BEFORE [[233721384511543.6503816592]]
REMOVE [[233721384511543.6503816592]]
INSERT {
readonly property ~&6503679477&~ secondView: ~&214625660372&~
~&214646099849&~: ~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~ || !~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated || (!splitDocumentView.~&6503936152&~?.~&6314931342349002257&~ && ~&456860916926733567&~.~&6503241380&~.~&7081907567135&~ === ~&456860916926733567&~.~&8399230650759125120&~) ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ : ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~/2
~&7082729686082&~: ~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated && !(!splitDocumentView.~&6503936152&~?.~&6314931342349002257&~ && ~&456860916926733567&~.~&6503241380&~.~&7081907567135&~ === ~&456860916926733567&~.~&8399230650759125120&~) ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~/2 : ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
}
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
~&254494525842443467&~ {
    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
    ~&17223207193572774747&~: ~&6504329801&~
    ~&254542253295368380&~: (~&214625221355&~) => {
    	~&7713694313857736&~.~&9186019576827190292&~();
        ~&214625221355&~.~&7712791479213250&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
	openInSplitView = ~&214625660372&~;
    }
}
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[254540341572282132]]
LOCATE BEFORE [[233721384511543.6503816592]]
INSERT {
~&6503711953&~: ~&6504329801&~
readonly property ~&6503679477&~ secondNavigator: ~&214625660372&~
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[15793094956877902211]]
REPLACE [[214646099849]] WITH {
~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
}
REPLACE [[7082729686082]] WITH {
~&7082729686082&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
}
REPLACE [[233721384511543.7712879746914881]] WITH {
~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: ~&7713694313857736&~.~&197100796&~
~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&7713694313857736&~.~&6504027668&~
~&6503711953&~: ~&6504329801&~
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[14771436816723967378]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
readonly property ~&6503679477&~ hasQuickSettingsGesture: !~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated || ~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[11542018640809782132]] 
IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7713561876955258]] [[180922.180921]] ;QuickSettingsToggle
IMPORT [[7082546018834]] [[180922.180921]] ;Values
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
~&10845406345867313529&~ {
    ~&5972374&~: splitViewToggle

    ~&7713561545874130&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated
    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated ? ~&"4947436540995944227&~ : ~&"7424592205469683787&~
    ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~ 
    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
        ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated = !~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated;
    }
}
}
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[10936356414964521612]]
IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7713561876955258]] [[180922.180921]] ;QuickSettingsToggle
IMPORT [[7082546018834]] [[180922.180921]] ;Values
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
~&10845406345867313529&~ {
    ~&5972374&~: splitViewToggle

    ~&7713561545874130&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated
    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated ? ~&"4947436540995944227&~ : ~&"7424592205469683787&~
    ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~ 
    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
        ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated = !~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated;
    }
}
}
END AFFECT
;AFFECT /qml/device/view/syncserviceexplorer/ExplorerView.qml
;TRAVERSE ?#root
;REBUILD openId
;LOCATE AFTER STREAM | root.setLongPressTooltipAsCompleted(); } |
;INSERT { openInSplitView = secondNavigator; }
;END REBUILD
;END TRAVERSE
;END AFFECT
AFFECT [[6722609618937832156]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]] > [[6502786168]]:[[6144132522167405889]]
REPLACE [[12921149980962105220]] WITH {
~&12921149980962105220&~: ~&7069700017500842008&~.~&233748328658231&~ ? ~&7069700017500842008&~.~&12921149980962105220&~ : ~&500047409926864674&~.~&12921149980962105220&~
}
REPLACE [[2122835675838176157]] WITH {
~&2122835675838176157&~: ~&7069700017500842008&~.~&233748328658231&~ ? ~&7069700017500842008&~.~&2122835675838176157&~ : ~&500047409926864674&~.~&2122835675838176157&~
}
TRAVERSE [[14125623155555875541]]#[[7069700017500842008]]
REPLACE [[233748328658231]] WITH {
~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&254525457827593836&~.~&7082729686082&~ >= ~&7069700017500842008&~.~&2122835675838176157&~
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE [[254501558939456351]]#[[500047409926864674]]
REPLACE [[233748328658231]] WITH {
~&233748328658231&~: !~&7069700017500842008&~.~&233748328658231&~
}
END TRAVERSE
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT /appload/qml/appload.qml
TRAVERSE ?#_appLoadView
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
REBUILD launchWindow
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM \~&7083181535963&~\
;TODO: Find the deviceAspectRatio from screen instead
INSERT {
                    deviceAspectRatio = "original";
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
REBUILD [[10328255948237234147]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT { ~&6504254477&~.~&473450369389093477&~ && }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]] > [[4829825519784862555]][.[[8399878573055752961]]=[["254540339219804849]]]
REBUILD [[233726547792244]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT { ~&6504254477&~.~&473450369389093477&~ && }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[8399343920170215954]]
REBUILD [[9195912426736758899]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT { !secondNavigator && }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[16535813298890332374]]
REBUILD [[7082453764421]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT {!secondNavigator && }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[17298303916558156758]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[254549375155946341]]
TRAVERSE [[8545339034058226003]][.[[8399878573055752961]]=[["13114419657032959042]]]
REPLACE [[6503646466]] WITH {
~&6503646466&~: hasQuickSettingsGesture ? ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~ - ~&7082020628281&~.~&1744594906900597270&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7712963399941241&~) : ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7712963399941241&~)
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE [[8545339034058226003]][.[[8399878573055752961]]=[["13989711287812426982]]]
;Hack since the area in the close-scene-view gesture, does not calculate correctly
REBUILD [[495358363329399331]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT { !hasQuickSettingsGesture ? ~&6504391364&~.~&15738511858360073246&~() :  }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[16664384747789373392]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[8399790159161167514]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
~&233748328658231&~: !(~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated && secondNavigator)
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[14500576802168220354]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
~&233748328658231&~: !~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActivated || ( secondNavigator ? !~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~ : ~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~)
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[17477757197668945522]] 
TRAVERSE ?#[[988484618983443788]]
REMOVE [[8545339034058226003]][.[[8399878573055752961]]=[["15264041274426464048]]]
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[39535620879384660]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[233748385765473]]
REPLACE [[214646099849]] WITH {
~&214646099849&~: ~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~.~&12597718284824111823&~.~&214646099849&~
~&180993&~: 0
~&7083038346995&~: ~&7713531976371484&~ 
}
REPLACE [[180994]] WITH {
~&180994&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~.~&12597718284824111823&~.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&233748385765473&~.~&7082729686082&~
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[478117897681303779]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
~&214646099849&~: ~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~.~&12597718284824111823&~.~&214646099849&~
~&180993&~: 0
~&180994&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~.~&12597718284824111823&~.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&478117897681303779&~.~&7082729686082&~
~&7083038346995&~: ~&7713531976371484&~
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
REPLACE [[14953652214069020552]] WITH {
	property ~&197102514&~ ~&14953652214069020552&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7083038346995&~.~&7083038346995&~.~&7083038346995&~.secondView ? fakeToolbarPositioner : ~&14259564207776773479&~.~&8399943657237507093&~
	~&7712130752583461&~ {
		~&5972374&~: fakeToolbarPositioner
		property ~&6503679477&~ ~&14593461789319363686&~ : ~&14259564207776773479&~.~&8399943657237507093&~.~&14593461789319363686&~
		property ~&197088788&~ ~&7713446884515614&~: ~&14593461789319363686&~ ? ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.secondToolbarPortraitPosition : ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.secondToolbarHorizontalPosition
		property ~&197088788&~ ~&8399947275354039176&~: 0
		onPreferenceChanged: {
			~&5972376&~(!~&233745975898428&~.~&7712938630327660&~) {
				~&5972376&~ (~&14593461789319363686&~) {
					~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.secondToolbarPortraitPosition = ~&8399947275354039176&~;
				} ~&6503784146&~ {
					~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.secondToolbarHorizontalPosition = ~&8399947275354039176&~;
				}
			}
		}
	}	 
	~&13733777459642361598&~: {
		~&5972376&~(~&233748328658231&~) {
			~&14259564207776773479&~.~&6027679186646547632&~(~&4367731859579753176&~);
		}
	}	 
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
